## ⚡ Performance Impact
**Performance Considerations:**
- [ ] 📊 No performance regressions introduced
- [ ] 📦 Bundle size impact analyzed and acceptable
- [ ] 🗄️ Database queries optimized (if applicable)
- [ ] 💾 Caching strategy implemented where appropriate
- [ ] ⏳ Loading states and error handling added
- [ ] 🎵 Audio/media optimization considered (if applicable)

**Metrics:**
- Bundle size change: [e.g. +5KB, -2KB, no change]
- Performance impact: [e.g. Lighthouse score maintained, Load time improved by 200ms]

## ♿ Accessibility Compliance
**WCAG 2.1 AA Compliance:**
- [ ] 🖱️ Keyboard navigation works properly
- [ ] 📖 Screen reader compatibility verified
- [ ] 🎨 Color contrast requirements met (4.5:1 minimum)
- [ ] 🖼️ Alternative text provided for images
- [ ] 🎵 Captions/transcripts provided for audio content
- [ ] 🔍 Focus indicators visible and appropriate
- [ ] 📝 Form labels and instructions clear
- [ ] 🏗️ Semantic HTML structure maintained

**Assistive Technology Testing:**
- [ ] 🍎 VoiceOver (macOS/iOS) tested
- [ ] 🪟 NVDA/JAWS (Windows) tested
- [ ] ⌨️ Keyboard-only navigation tested
- [ ] 🔍 Screen magnification compatibility verified
